name: diagGetIterationCount, diagGetRespIterationCount
title: diagGetIterationCount, diagGetRespIterationCount
syntax: long diagGetIterationCount( diagRequest obj, char complexParamQualifier[]);
long diagGetIterationCount( diagResponse obj, char complexParamQualifier[]);
long diagGetRespIterationCount( diagRequest obj, char complexParamQualifier[]);
description: Returns the number of sub-parameter iterations the complex parameter holds.

parameters.name: complexParamQualifier
parameters.description: Qualifier of the complex parameter that holds an iteration.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
